name: Developer-Centric API Tools with Git & Secret Management
description: Developers are increasingly frustrated with proprietary and costly API development platforms that lack deep integration with version control systems (like Git) for managing API collections and environments, and comprehensive secret management across local and cloud environments.
pain_points: Frustration with proprietary & costly API development platforms
Lack of deep Git integration for API collections and environments
Inadequate secret management across local & cloud environments
Forced migrations due to changes in commercial tool policies
Manual workflows for versioning API configurations
